rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks using valid syntax: assume, guarantee, eq, const, and assign statements
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes, and assignments in implementation annexes when appropriate
Use only visible identifiers from the current component scope in AGREE expressions
For implementation contracts, use assign only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for input assumptions and output guarantees
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in output dependency guarantees
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be written inside annex agree blocks
Use exact current-case names from the model index in AGREE expressions
Treat each annex agree block as scoped to its owning component declaration
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not copy identifiers from examples or invent ports/components
Do not use unresolved references to AADL properties inside AGREE annexes
